ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the state was established */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the governor of the state */,
  "chief_minister_name" TEXT /* Name of the chief minister of the state */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the state government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "headquarter" TEXT /* Headquarter of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was established */,
  "district_magistrate_name" TEXT /* Name of the district magistrate */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the district government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative body */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the administrative body */,
  "head_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the head officer of the administrative body */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the administrative body was established */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the administrative body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_mechanisms" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control mechanism */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control mechanism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control mechanism */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference or document number that defines the control mechanism */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the control mechanism was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration status */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference or document number that defines the integration status */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration status was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative unit */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the unit is located */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the administrative unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the unit */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative unit */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the administrative unit in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the administrative unit was established */,
  "head_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the head officer of the administrative unit */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the administrative unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_units_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control assignment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative unit */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control mechanism */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the control mechanism became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the control mechanism will end or has ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the control assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_assignments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_assignments_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES control_mechanisms ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative unit */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration status */,
  "date_of_change" TEXT /* Date when the integration status changed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration status will end or has ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the integration record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_records_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES integration_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_records_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative officer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the officer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "date_of_appointment" TEXT /* Date when the officer was appointed */,
  "date_of_retirement" TEXT /* Date when the officer will retire or has retired */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the officer */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the officer's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_officers" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control mechanism */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative officer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the officer's control assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the officer's control assignment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the officer's control assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id", "officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative unit */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report to support versioning */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_reports_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES administrative_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control event */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative unit */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control mechanism */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the control event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_events_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES control_mechanisms ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_events_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative unit */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration status */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the integration event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_events_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES integration_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_events_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)
